name: Novita AI
description: Registers Novita AI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Novita API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Novita API key
settings.description: Novita API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to NOVITA_API_KEY.

providers.name: Novita AI
providers.description: Refreshes Novita chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
